panels.title: TTFT p95
panels.description: TTFT p95. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(sglang:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: E2E p95
panels.description: E2E p95. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(sglang:e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Core latency p50/p95/p99 + queue
panels.description: Core latency p50/p95/p99 + queue. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(sglang:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))); histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(sglang:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Inter-token latency / throughput proxy
panels.description: Exact lines use sglang:inter_token_latency_seconds_* from the provided metrics list. Proxy lines use throughput-derived estimates and are not equivalent to request-level ITL under concurrency.

panels.title: Cache hit ratio and token pressure
panels.description: Cache hit ratio and token pressure. Main query: 100 * avg(sglang:cache_hit_rate{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}); 100 * avg(sglang:token_usage{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"})

panels.title: GPU utilization by GPU
panels.description: GPU utilization by GPU. Main query: avg by (gpu) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{instance=~"$gpu_instance"})

panels.title: GPU memory used by GPU
panels.description: GPU memory used by GPU. Main query: DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}; DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}

panels.title: GPU temperature by GPU
panels.description: GPU temperature by GPU. Main query: DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}

panels.title: GPU power by GPU
panels.description: GPU power by GPU. Main query: DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}

panels.title: GPU mem util avg
panels.description: GPU mem util avg. Main query: 100 * sum(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}) / clamp_min(sum(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{instance=~"$gpu_instance"} + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}), 1e-9)

panels.title: Est. GPU BW B/s
panels.description: Est. GPU BW B/s. Main query: sum(rate(sglang:estimated_read_bytes_per_gpu_total{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum(rate(sglang:estimated_write_bytes_per_gpu_total{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Host load
panels.description: Host load. Main query: node_load1{instance=~"$node_instance"}; node_load5{instance=~"$node_instance"}
Can exceed 100 if the process uses more than one CPU core.

targets.legendFormat: SGLang process CPU % of one core

panels.title: SGLang process CPU %
SGLang HTTP / request activity
panels.description: SGLang HTTP / request activity. Main query: sum(rate(sglang:http_requests_total{instance=~"$sglang_instance"}[$__rate_interval])); sum(rate(sglang:http_responses_total{instance=~"$sglang_instance"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Filesystem usage % by mountpoint
panels.description: Filesystem usage % by mountpoint. Main query: 100 * (1 - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance=~"$node_instance",fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs|ramfs|nsfs",mountpoint!~"/run.*|/var/lib/docker/.+"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=~"$node_instance",fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs|ramfs|nsfs",mountpoint!~"/run.*|/var/lib/docker/.+"})

panels.title: TCP backlog / retransmit signals
panels.description: TCP backlog / retransmit signals. Main query: node_netstat_Tcp_CurrEstab{instance=~"$node_instance"}; sum(rate(node_netstat_TcpExt_ListenDrops{instance=~"$node_instance"}[5m]))

panels.title: Per vCPU load
panels.description: Per vCPU load. Main query: 100 * (1 - irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance=~"$node_instance", mode="idle"}[10s]))

panels.title: HTTP server latency p50/p95/p99
panels.description: HTTP server latency p50/p95/p99. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance"}[$__rate_interval]))); histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: SGLang target up
panels.description: SGLang target up. Main query: max(up{instance=~"$sglang_instance"})

panels.title: Node exporter up
panels.description: Node exporter up. Main query: max(up{instance=~"$node_instance"})

panels.title: DCGM exporter up
panels.description: DCGM exporter up. Main query: max(up{instance=~"$gpu_instance"})
Peak = max over selected time range.

panels.description: Peak = max over selected time range.

panels.description: Total used SSD bytes across selected node_instance values.
panels.title: SSD used total (contour)

panels.description: Total available SSD bytes across selected node_instance values.

panels.description: Weighted usage across selected node_instance values.

panels.description: Current established TCP connections on selected host(s).
panels.title: TCP estab current

panels.description: Per-server SSD usage. Per-model SSD usage is not available from node_exporter/SGLang metrics alone.
panels.title: SSD used by server
SGLang TTFT latency heatmap
panels.description: SGLang TTFT latency heatmap. Main query: sum(increase(sglang:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le)

panels.title: SGLang E2E latency heatmap
panels.description: SGLang E2E latency heatmap. Main query: sum(increase(sglang:e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le)

panels.title: SGLang per-stage request latency
panels.description: SGLang per-stage request latency. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, stage) (rate(sglang:per_stage_req_latency_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))); histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, stage) (rate(sglang:per_stage_req_latency_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])))
Uses SGLang token pool pressure gauges. full_token_usage may be absent on some versions.
panels.title: Token pool usage

panels.description: Decode / CUDA graph signals. Main query: avg(sglang:decode_sum_seq_lens{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}); sum(rate(sglang:cuda_graph_passes_total{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))
panels.title: Decode / CUDA graph signals
Queue / stage latency
panels.description: Queue / stage latency. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(sglang:queue_time_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))); histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(sglang:queue_time_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Prompt tokens distribution quantiles
panels.description: Prompt tokens distribution quantiles. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(sglang:prompt_tokens_histogram_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))); histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(sglang:prompt_tokens_histogram_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Generation tokens distribution quantiles
panels.description: Generation tokens distribution quantiles. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(sglang:generation_tokens_histogram_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval]))); histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(sglang:generation_tokens_histogram_bucket{instance=~"$sglang_instance",model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])))
